data.name: Hentai Tales: Office Sex Handler
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法


在享受香豔故事的同時挑戰燒腦謎題！
依照數字順序連接棋盤上的所有方格
完成謎題即可解鎖全新色氣場景與後續劇情！
你能解開所有謎題並攻略全部女孩嗎？！

故事背景


日本頂尖商社裡又一個枯燥乏味的日子。
我，田中一也——不過是個毫無存在感的平凡社員。
但這副庸碌皮囊下藏著不為人知的頭銜：「性服務專員」。
被選入扭曲的公司計畫後，我開始在密室中「慰勞」女同事們...

登場角色

森川千花：


「那、那個...請不要盯著我看...(♡﹃♡)」*
粉髮新人社員，患有嚴重社交恐懼症，卻擁有與怯懦性格矛盾的Z罩杯肉體。
私下沉迷成人漫畫...還有你。

佐藤明美：


「這只是...咳，職務考核的一環」
戴眼鏡的嚴苛副部長。從未體驗過快感的W罩杯冰美人，以「職場研究」為名義命令你進行「特別服務」。

遊戲特色


  • 20張性感火辣的美少女圖片
  • 與性格迥異女孩們展開的奇幻情色故事
  • 可跳過解謎直接享受劇情（解謎中按Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎後點擊CG左右按鈕切換）

*具備完整音效支援的語言

  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Office Sex Handler
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

Another monotonous day at Japan's largest trading company.
Me, Tanaka Kazuya—just an ordinary, overlooked employee.
But beneath this dull exterior lies a secret title: "Sexual Service Specialist."
Chosen for a twisted company program, I service female coworkers behind closed doors...

Characters

Morikawa Chika:

"P-pl-please don’t look at me...(♡﹃♡)"*
A pink-haired new hire with crippling social anxiety—and a Z-cup body that contradicts her timid personality.
Secretly obsessed with adult manga... and you.

Satō Akemi:

"This is purely for... ahem, evaluation purposes."
The strict, glasses-wearing deputy director. A frigid W-cup beauty who’s never experienced pleasure—until ordering your "services" under the guise of "workplace research."

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
